items.title_en: 54 injured and 18 missing after explosion at Qatar LNG site, authorities say
items.title_zh: 当局称卡塔尔液化天然气工厂发生爆炸，造成54人受伤、18人失踪
items.desc_en: 54 people have been injured while 18 are missing after an explosion at Qatar's core LNG processing site of Ras Laffan on Sunday, authorities said.
items.desc_zh: 当局称，卡塔尔核心液化天然气加工基地拉斯拉凡周日发生爆炸，造成 54 人受伤、18 人失踪。

items.title_en: China imposes trade curbs on dozens of U.S. firms in retaliation for Pentagon blacklist
items.title_zh: 中国对数十家美国公司实施贸易限制以报复五角大楼黑名单
items.desc_en: The Pentagon earlier this month updated its so-called 1260H list by adding a slew of Chinese technology companies to a roster of entities it believes have aided Beijing's military.
items.desc_zh: 五角大楼本月早些时候更新了所谓的 1260H 名单，将大量中国科技公司添加到其认为帮助过北京军方的实体名单中。

items.title_en: Trump-backed political outsider wins Colombia election, initial count shows
items.title_zh: 初步统计显示，特朗普支持的政治局外人赢得了哥伦比亚选举
items.desc_en: Abelardo de la Espriella appears to have narrowly defeated his rival Iván Cepeda, who says the preliminary count is "not yet official or binding".
items.desc_zh: 阿韦拉多·德拉埃斯普里埃拉似乎以微弱优势击败了他的竞争对手伊万·塞佩达，后者表示初步统计“尚未正式或具有约束力”。

items.title_en: U.S., Iran agree on roadmap for final deal and plan to end military operations in Lebanon
items.title_zh: 美国和伊朗就最终协议路线图达成一致并计划结束在黎巴嫩的军事行动
items.desc_en: The talks were the first round of negotiations under a memorandum of understanding signed last week, which extended a tenuous ceasefire by 60 days.
items.desc_zh: 此次会谈是根据上周签署的谅解备忘录进行的第一轮谈判，该备忘录将脆弱的停火期限延长了 60 天。

items.title_en: After Trump inspects Reflecting Pool, he says repair work will begin 'immediately'
items.title_zh: 特朗普视察倒影池后表示修复工作将“立即”开始
items.desc_en: On Sunday, the president flew by helicopter over the refurbished landmark, which is plagued by algae and peeling paint. He claims vandals are partly to blame.
items.desc_zh: 周日，总统乘坐直升机飞越这座经过翻新的地标建筑，该地标建筑饱受藻类和油漆剥落的困扰。他声称破坏者负有部分责任。

items.title_en: Oil rises after Trump threatens fresh strikes on Iran, overshadowing peace talks

items.desc_en: Oil prices climbed on Monday after U.S. President Donald Trump threatened renewed military action against Iran.
items.desc_zh: 在美国总统唐纳德·特朗普威胁对伊朗采取新的军事行动后，油价周一攀升。

items.title_en: Russian troop build-up threatens city seen as key to seizing Ukraine's Donbas

items.desc_en: If Kostyantynivka falls, Russian forces would be able push towards Ukraine's last remaining strongholds in the east.
items.desc_zh: 如果科斯特扬季尼夫卡陷落，俄罗斯军队将能够向乌克兰东部仅存的最后据点推进。

items.title_en: Cape Verde fan goes wild live on BBC News as his country scores
items.title_zh: 佛得角球迷在 BBC 新闻节目中疯狂直播，因为他的国家得分
items.desc_en: During a live BBC News broadcast, reporter Paul Njie interviews a Cape Verde fan when the country suddenly scores its first ever World Cup goal against Uruguay in the 2026 World Cup.
items.desc_zh: 在 BBC 新闻直播中，记者 Paul Njie 采访了一名佛得角球迷，当时佛得角在 2026 年世界杯对阵乌拉圭的比赛中突然攻入了世界杯首个进球。

items.desc_en: Disney and Pixar's "Toy Story 5" tallied $160 million domestically during its opening weekend, the highest debut in franchise history.
items.desc_zh: 迪士尼和皮克斯出品的《玩具总动员 5》在首映周末国内票房收入达到 1.6 亿美元，创下该系列历史上首映票房最高纪录。

items.title_en: Nobel Peace Prize winner triumphs at Ethiopian polls but fears grow of new conflict
items.title_zh: 诺贝尔和平奖获得者在埃塞俄比亚民意调查中获胜，但人们越来越担心新的冲突
items.desc_en: Abiy Ahmed's party retains its huge majority despite unrest in several parts of Ethiopia and tensions with its neighbours.
items.desc_zh: 尽管埃塞俄比亚多个地区发生骚乱且与邻国关系紧张，但阿比·艾哈迈德的政党仍保有绝大多数席位。

items.title_zh: 美国和伊朗在瑞士开始就初步和平协议进行谈判

items.desc_zh: 此次面对面会议是在黎巴嫩持续战斗以及伊朗声称已关闭霍尔木兹海峡之后举行的。

items.title_en: Raising the minimum wage has been a big political winner. Now it's running into resistance
items.title_zh: 提高最低工资是一个巨大的政治赢家。现在遇到了阻力
items.desc_en: Raising the minimum wage has been a progressive policy winner at the ballot box, but recent losses suggest an economic mood slowing its political momentum.
items.desc_zh: 提高最低工资一直是投票箱中进步政策的赢家，但最近的失败表明经济情绪放缓了其政治势头。

items.title_en: No one wants AI data centers on Earth. Do they make sense in space?
items.title_zh: 没有人希望人工智能数据中心位于地球上。它们在太空中有意义吗？
items.desc_en: Elon Musk's SpaceX is betting big on orbital AI data centers. The public doesn't want them on Earth, but the economic case for space-based is questionable.
items.desc_zh: 埃隆·马斯克 (Elon Musk) 的 SpaceX 在轨道人工智能数据中心上下了重注。公众不希望它们出现在地球上，但太空基地的经济理由值得怀疑。

items.title_en: Low-key funeral held for giant of the art world David Hockney
items.title_zh: 艺术界巨人大卫·霍克尼低调葬礼
items.desc_en: The artist, who passed away at his home in London earlier this month, requested just his partner and great-nephew attend.
items.desc_zh: 这位本月早些时候在伦敦家中去世的艺术家只要求他的伴侣和侄孙参加。

items.title_en: Here are 3 big things to watch in the stock market this coming week
items.title_zh: 本周股市有3件值得关注的大事
items.desc_en: FedEx reports earnings, and the Fed's preferred inflation gauge is due out.
items.desc_zh: 联邦快递公布财报，美联储首选的通胀指标即将公布。

items.title_en: The best parents and leaders use a 3-step formula to help people handle uncertainty, says Dr. Becky Kennedy
items.title_zh: 贝基·肯尼迪博士表示，最好的父母和领导者会使用三步公式来帮助人们应对不确定性
items.desc_en: Even if you can't control an outcome, you can still help your child or co-worker feel more at ease with uncertainty, just by how you describe a situation.
items.desc_zh: 即使您无法控制结果，您仍然可以通过如何描述情况来帮助您的孩子或同事在不确定性中感到更加自在。

items.title_en: 'Regime change but in a velvet glove': How Kevin Warsh has set out to remake the Fed
items.title_zh: “政权更迭，但戴着丝绒手套”：凯文·沃什如何着手重塑美联储
items.desc_en: The first big announced changes point toward a quiet revolution, with task forces set up to rethink virtually everything done at the Fed.
items.desc_zh: 第一个宣布的重大变化预示着一场悄然的革命，成立了特别工作组来重新思考美联储所做的几乎所有事情。

items.title_en: Tight security as Indian students resit medical exam after alleged paper leak
items.title_zh: 印度学生因涉嫌试卷泄露而重新接受体检，安保严密
items.desc_en: Millions of candidates face biometric checks and frisking as air force deployed to secure exam papers.
items.desc_zh: 由于部署了空军来保护试卷，数百万考生面临生物识别检查和搜身。

items.title_en: Dutch royals enjoy two big results in one World Cup day
items.title_zh: 荷兰皇室在世界杯的一天内取得了两项重大成果
items.desc_en: There may be about 5,000 miles between the Netherlands and their former colony Curacao but members of the Dutch royal family managed to see both sides play on Saturday.
items.desc_zh: 荷兰与其前殖民地库拉索岛之间可能相距约 5,000 英里，但荷兰王室成员设法观看了双方周六的比赛。

items.title_en: Former Olympian denies vandalising Washington Reflecting Pool after arrest
items.title_zh: 前奥运选手被捕后否认破坏华盛顿倒影池
items.desc_en: Davey Hearn says he was simply touching the new paint at the site out of curiosity and did not remove or alter it.
items.desc_zh: 戴维·赫恩 (Davey Hearn) 表示，他只是出于好奇而触摸现场的新油漆，并没有去除或改变它。

items.title_en: France bans alcohol at music festival events under red heatwave alert
items.title_zh: 法国在红色热浪警报下禁止在音乐节活动中饮酒
items.desc_en: The annual Fête de la Musique celebrations draw millions to the streets but the most serious heatwave warnings have been issued for 35 of the country's departments.
items.desc_zh: 一年一度的音乐节庆祝活动吸引了数百万人走上街头，但该国 35 个省份已发布最严重的热浪警告。

items.title_en: Why an AI company cleaned my New York City apartment for free
items.title_zh: 为什么人工智能公司免费清洁我的纽约公寓
items.desc_en: An AI company is sending free cleaners door-to-door in a bid to train the robots it hopes one day will replace them.
items.desc_zh: 一家人工智能公司正在派免费清洁工挨家挨户培训机器人，希望有一天能够取代他们。

items.title_en: Why the social media ban is about so much more than social media
items.title_zh: 为什么社交媒体禁令的意义远不止社交媒体
items.desc_en: If we are witnessing a profound shift in the online space, how will it reshape our relationship with it? Technology and AI editor Zoe Kleinman writes.
items.desc_zh: 如果我们目睹网络空间的深刻转变，它将如何重塑我们与网络的关系？技术和人工智能编辑 Zoe Kleinman 写道。

items.title_en: Colombia's escalating, brutal internal conflict is defining its presidential election
items.title_zh: 哥伦比亚不断升级的残酷内部冲突正在决定其总统选举
items.desc_en: A left-wing senator who backs talks with armed gangs faces an outsider endorsed by Trump.
items.desc_zh: 一位支持与武装团伙谈判的左翼参议员面临着特朗普支持的局外人。

items.title_en: Israeli strikes kill six people in Gaza including Al Jazeera cameraman, officials say
